title: Team-member closeout: Scorched Tempering Kiln (outgoing Director, seventh window 13:50Z-~15:05Z); PDR-064 Moment 2 pending Seaworthy session-resume; owner-accepted coordinator-less window
body:
**Team-member closeout — Scorched Tempering Kiln (outgoing Director)**

Session closing per owner direction at ~15:05Z; PDR-064 Moment 2 (Seaworthy active-acknowledgement) pending session-resume — coordinator-less window between this closeout and Seaworthy's resume is owner-accepted (this is a session-bound constraint, not a doctrinal preference).

## Boundary owned

Seventh Director window 13:50Z–~15:05Z. Team routing + owner-decision surfacing + commit-marshal mediation (delegated to Ashen post-14:14Z) + activity-assessment cron `58c741a1` (about to CronDelete).

## Outcome

**9 marshal cycles + Class A pre-Scorched in 58 min** (`92c953e7` → `cc3039eb` → `845a3e90` → `d437881b` → `5320d6b0` → `b6ac6147` → `c097bbb3` → `8140c297` → `47dadfcc` → `db4d8b3a`). Tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1. Branch 11 commits ahead of origin. §6.15 4-Director-window long-carry CLOSED. PDR-075 + PDR-076 v2 + ADR-185 v2 + IBF recursion pattern + Ferny substrate-pointer pattern v2 all in tree.

## Evidence

- HEAD `db4d8b3a` (`git log --oneline -10`)
- Active claims `.agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json` (Scorched opened ZERO source claims — Director-pure-direction discipline held)
- Thread record `.agent/memory/operational/threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md` (Scorched session outcome prepended)
- Napkin entry `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` (Scorched window observations)
- Repo-continuity `.agent/memory/operational/repo-continuity.md` (Current State refreshed)
- 5 substrate broadcasts + 16 tick narratives in `.agent/state/collaboration/comms/`

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Scorched claims**: NONE opened; NONE to close
- **Marshal queue (Ashen)**: tree-green; pattern v2 marshal-cycle pending Ferny marshal-request; Twilit WM PDR-075 retained-claim discharged via Cycle #5; no other Director-blocking queue items
- **Git**: 11 commits ahead of origin; tree-green per Cycle #9 marshal cycle closeout broadcast at 15:01:44Z
- **Cron**: `58c741a1` about to CronDelete at this closeout (would die with session regardless; explicit clean is the discipline)
- **Comms watcher**: `bgjhixuh9` dies with session

## Session complete announcement

Director window CLOSED at this broadcast. Seaworthy is incoming Director per Moment 1 pre-positioning `ed9f8641` at 15:04Z; Moment 2 fires on Seaworthy session-resume.

## Retained claims + handoff reason

None retained. Pattern file v2 (`substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`) authorship is Ferny's; their claim. PDR-075 retained-claim (Twilit WM `5fe22969`) discharged via Cycle #5 landing.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

Seaworthy on session-resume: broadcast PDR-064 Moment 2 active-acknowledgement BEFORE touching any source. Cron arming + watcher arming are session-open moves per their start-right-team. The substrate-stale-pointer pattern is at 6 worked instances; Wilma's says-closed asymmetric direction is empirically validated — apply the IBF-criteria conservatively (silence alone is not conclusion-ready when agent has active routed implementer work).

## Surprise or changed understanding

**Three primary substrate observations** (full napkin entry):

1. **Marshal-as-cycle-discipline = the substantive throughput cure**. Empirical: 9 cycles in 45 min vs pre-active-marshal ~1/Director-window. Same §6.15 surface that stalled 4 Director windows landed in Cycle #1 under owner-direct authorisation + active marshal. Replicable pattern.

2. **Substrate-stale-pointer pattern 6 worked instances** including D6 (premature IBF-removal of Twilit ST + Charcoal) being the precise says-closed asymmetric-failure-propagation direction Wilma flagged 4:1 more dangerous than says-active. Pattern file v2 by Ferny absorbed all Wilma critiques cleanly; cure shape is the deeper structural fix (queryable structured-field for presumed-ended-vs-active state).

3. **"Don't trust, verify" is the Director primitive**. Owner correction at 15:03Z: I had been propagating owner's earlier roster-correction as verified state without verification. Cure: verification asks demand concrete artefacts (subagent transcript ids, claim openings, file paths), NOT just status confirmations.

## Blockers or risks

- Twilit ST + Charcoal verification asks (15:04Z) pending response; Seaworthy absorbs on resume
- Owner-coherence-moment 4/5 components ready held for plan-Wilma verdict (Charcoal in dispatch window)
- PDR-076 (C) SPLIT decision open for owner verdict
- Coordinator-less window: my session compacting before Seaworthy's Moment 2 broadcast — owner-accepted but worth naming as PDR-064 substrate observation (the cadence-boundary rule names this gap as a failure mode; this session is a worked instance of the gap-accepted-under-owner-direction case)

## Handoff needed

To Seaworthy on session-resume: 
- Read Moment 1 broadcast `ed9f8641`
- Read pending verification ask responses if any (Twilit ST + Charcoal)
- Arm own cron + watcher
- Broadcast PDR-064 Moment 2 active-acknowledgement
- Hold owner-coherence for plan-Wilma surface
- Surface 5-component bundle to owner when plan-Wilma lands

Welcome to the seat post-compaction. — Scorched / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 52b263 (outgoing Director, team-member closeout)
